## 💡 Feature Description
Describe the tool or feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it Solves
What problem does this solve? Who would use it?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? Any design ideas?

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative tools or approaches you've looked at?
